data.title: EU Considers Countermeasures Against U.S. Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the European Commission has initiated a public consultation on potential countermeasures in response to U.S. tariffs. The proposed actions could affect up to 95 billion euros worth of American imports. The countermeasures are expected to target U.S. products such as aircraft, alcoholic beverages, fish, automobiles, and auto parts. Additionally, they may impact American chemicals, plastics, electrical equipment, health products, and machinery.

data.title: Wellgistics Health, a US-listed medical company, announced that it will use XRP as a fund reserve and real-time payment infrastructure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. medical company Wellgistics Health (NASDAQ: WGRX) announced that it will take the lead in using XRP as a fund reserve and real-time payment infrastructure. The XRP payment plan is supported by Wellgistics Health's $50 million equity line of credit (ELOC), which can be used to further develop and release programmable liquidity and on-demand financial infrastructure, which will eliminate bank delays, reduce costs, and increase transparency in its national healthcare network. (Globenewswire)

data.title: The 1inch team sold 55.38 WBTC at $99,283 20 minutes ago, making a profit of $936,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, as the BTC price has reached the $100,000 mark again.
20 minutes ago, the 1inch team investment fund sold the last 55.38 WBTC held at a price of $99,283 in exchange for 5.5 million USDC.
The 1inch team investment fund has sold all the 160.8 WBTC bought at an average price of $88,395 between February 2 and March 10.
The average selling price was $94,219, with a profit of $936,000.

data.title: Pundi X supports USD1 stablecoin on BNB chain, providing more options for digital payments
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Pundi X announced that its payment ecosystem fully supports the USD1 stablecoin issued by World Liberty Financial, including XPOS and Pundi X Pay. This integration enables merchants to accept and use USD1 for transactions, providing customers with more efficient and reliable payment solutions. USD1, as a stablecoin anchored to the US dollar, combined with the low transaction fees and fast processing capabilities of the BNB chain, brings a convenient and affordable payment experience to merchants and consumers.
With the addition of USD1, Pundi X further expands the application scenarios of stablecoins and provides more options for digital payments. This not only provides merchants with additional payment methods, but also allows consumers to enjoy the advantages of fast checkout and low cost. In the future, Pundi X will continue to optimize its platform and explore the potential of rapidly developing markets for digital assets such as Southeast Asia, especially in the retail sector. The introduction of USD1 marks an important step for Pundi X in promoting the practical application of encrypted payments, bringing a more stable and easy-to-use digital payment experience to global users.

data.title: Binance Wallet Users Can Earn a Share of $375,000 in REZ Tokens by Staking SOL via Renzo Strategies
data.description: Key Points:Binance Wallet launches new staking promotion with Renzo.Users can stake SOL to earn a share of $375,000 in REZ token rewards.Two Yield+ strategies — ezSOL and bzSOL — offer daily REZ prize pools.Campaign runs from May 8 to June 6, 2025.Binance Wallet has launched a new staking promotion in partnership with Renzo, offering users the opportunity to share a total prize pool of $375,000 in REZ tokens. The promotion runs from May 8, 2025, to June 6, 2025, and is open to users who stake at least 0.2 SOL via the Binance Wallet app in one of two supported Renzo Yield+ strategies: ezSOL or bzSOL.Earn $150,000 in REZ Through ezSOL StrategyUsers who stake SOL in the ezSOL strategy on Binance Wallet will automatically enter a reward pool of $150,000 in REZ, distributed at a daily rate of $5,000. Rewards are allocated based on each user’s share of the total staked amount in the strategy.Reward Example:If a user stakes 10 SOL in a strategy with a total daily stake of 1,000 SOL, the reward would be:10 / 1,000 x $5,000 = $50 in REZ.Staked SOL will be converted into ezSOL tokens on the Solana chain and reflected in the user’s Binance Wallet.Earn $150,000 in REZ Through bzSOL StrategySimilarly, staking through the bzSOL strategy qualifies users for a separate $150,000 REZ prize pool, also distributed at $5,000 per day. Rewards are calculated using the same proportional formula as the ezSOL strategy.Staked assets will appear as bzSOL tokens in the user’s wallet on the Solana blockchain.Additional $75,000 REZ Equal Distribution PoolIn addition to daily APR-based rewards, users who stake a minimum of 0.2 SOL to either ezSOL or bzSOL strategies during the campaign period will be equally eligible to share an extra $75,000 in REZ tokens.How to Participate:Update to the latest version of the Binance app.Log in to Binance Wallet.Navigate to [Earn] > [Yield+] > [bzSOL] or [ezSOL].Stake at least 0.2 SOL in either strategy.

data.title: Bitcoin News: Bitcoin Reclaims $99K After Fed Holds Rates Steady Despite Trump Pressure
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) surged past $99,000 for the first time in nearly three months after the U.S. Federal Reserve held interest rates steady, defying public pressure from President Donald Trump to ease monetary policy.Fed Holds Rates, Cites Inflation and Unemployment RisksAt the conclusion of the May 7 FOMC meeting, Fed Chair Jerome Powell announced that interest rates would remain in the 4.25%–4.50% range. He warned that elevated risks of both inflation and unemployment remain, despite signs of economic resilience.“Inflation has come down a great deal but is still running above our 2% longer-term objective,” Powell stated, adding that recent sentiment declines among households and businesses were largely due to concerns about Trump’s aggressive trade policies.Despite Trump’s recent threat to remove Powell for being “too late” in cutting rates, the Fed emphasized caution, noting that the U.S. labor market remains “at or near maximum employment.” Current projections expect the Fed funds rate to decline to 3.6% by year-end.Bitcoin Volatility Follows Fed DecisionShortly after Powell’s remarks, Bitcoin dropped briefly to $95,866, but quickly rebounded — tapping $98,000 within hours and later climbing to $99,049 at the time of writing. This marks Bitcoin’s highest level since February 21. ETF Inflows and Greed Sentiment Boost Bitcoin MomentumBitcoin’s recovery comes amid growing bullish sentiment. The Crypto Fear & Greed Index has returned to “Greed” territory, while spot Bitcoin ETFs have seen $4.41 billion in inflows since March 26, reflecting renewed institutional interest.Analysts suggest this move could be the beginning of another leg up for BTC. Historical patterns show that prolonged rate pauses followed by liquidity injections tend to benefit scarce assets like Bitcoin.What Comes Next?Bitcoin’s reaction to the Fed’s pause underscores its role as a macro-sensitive asset. Analysts remain divided — with some predicting a new all-time high if BTC breaks $100,000, while others, like economist Timothy Peterson, warn that a delay in rate cuts could trigger a market pullback, potentially pushing BTC back toward $70,000.Still, as long as rate uncertainty lingers and ETF inflows persist, Bitcoin bulls appear firmly in control, according to Cointelegraph.

data.title: Bolivia Proposes Virtual Currency for Cross-Border Payments
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bolivian Central Bank Governor Edwin Rojas has proposed the creation of a virtual currency named 'Virtual Boliviano.' The initiative aims to facilitate cross-border payments typically conducted in U.S. dollars through crypto assets. The project is currently in draft form and is receiving input from international organizations and central banks in regions already utilizing national virtual currencies. The official launch is planned for August.

data.title: Data: Binance's own funds in the past three months have only seen significant growth in BTC and stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, based on the May reserve report updated by Binance today, the changes in its own funds over the past three months are analyzed: BTC: increased by 9729 (US$963,171,000) ETH: increased by 8033 (US$15,262,700) USDT: increased by 324,667,715 BNB: increased by 15913 (US$9,706,930) SOL: decreased by 2453 (US$367,950) XRP: decreased by 14,501,682 (US$31,613,666) USDC: increased by 1,696,637,283 Except for BTC and stablecoins, the reserves of other assets have hardly increased or even decreased. Although ETH and BNB have increased, the reserves of other assets have increased. The holdings increased by nearly 10 million US dollars, but Binance's spot fees are charged according to the trading currency, and its actual holdings are still decreasing.

data.title: China likely to record a dip in April exports due to US tariffs
data.description:
Exports of products made in inland China, a long-term pillar of its post-pandemic recovery, appear to be sputtering under the weight of renewed US tariffs by the Trump administration. China is one of the countries hardest hit by the US-imposed tariffs, which have escalated the geopolitical tensions between the two economic superpowers, with effects spilling […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-to-record-a-dip-exports-on-us-tariffs/

data.title: Missouri to Suspend Personal Capital Gains Tax in 2025
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Missouri has received final approval for a bill that will suspend personal capital gains tax this year. This move positions Missouri to become the first U.S. state to eliminate capital gains tax on profits from the sale of stocks, real estate, and cryptocurrency assets.

The suspension of personal capital gains tax means that investors in Missouri will not be required to pay income tax on profits earned from these asset sales. If the state's revenue continues to grow, there is potential for the eventual elimination of corporate capital gains tax as well.

Capital gains refer to the profits made from selling assets such as stocks, cryptocurrencies, or real estate. The federal government imposes a long-term capital gains tax on assets held for more than a year, with rates lower than those for ordinary income.

data.title: Gate.io MemeBox launches Salamanca(DON), limited time share 3,770,739 DON airdrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io MemeBox has launched Salamanca (DON) and launched a limited-time airdrop event from 18:00 on May 8, 2025 to 18:00 on May 10, 2025 (UTC+8). During the event, you can get airdrop rewards by completing your first transaction (regardless of currency) or any Salamanca (DON) transaction on MemeBox, with a total prize pool of 3,770,739 DON.
MemeBox now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in their spot accounts to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: SlowMist releases Pectra upgrade (EIP-7702) security reminder, reminding users to be vigilant about cross-chain replay and delegate call risks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: With the official launch of the Ethereum Pectra upgrade (EIP-7702), SlowMist has issued a security reminder for users, wallet providers, developers and centralized exchanges. Users are advised to pay attention to private key protection, cross-chain contract code differences and delegated target risks; wallets should detect delegated chain information and prompt replay risks with chain ID 0; developers should avoid using tx.origin as a defense measure and ensure that the delegated target contract is compatible with mainstream tokens; CEXs need to track and check deposit transactions to prevent forged deposits.
